description_long: This is a modern, low-profile sofa with a sleek, minimalist design and a deep burgundy color. The sofa features two wide seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which are attached and have a smooth, untextured surface. The armrests are straight, short, and padded, extending just slightly above the seat level and are accented with a subtle black band detail. The legs are thin, black, and slightly angled, providing a light and airy appearance while supporting the sofa at four corners and two central points. The backrest is straight and continuous, matching the width of the seat, and the overall silhouette is rectangular with gently rounded front corners. The upholstery appears to be made of leather or faux leather, giving the sofa a refined and contemporary look suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, burgundy leather sofa with attached seat and back cushions, straight padded armrests, and slim black legs. Its modern, minimalist design features smooth surfaces and subtle black accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sofa's two wide seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and slim black legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sofa's short, padded armrest and the gentle curve of the seat's front edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous backrest and the arrangement of the supporting legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two wide, attached seat cushions and two matching attached backrest cushions, all uniform in size and shape, forming a continuous seating and back surface.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, short, and padded armrests at each end, slightly above seat level, with a subtle black band accent and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slim, black, metal legs—four at the corners and two central supports—angled slightly outward, exposed and minimalistic in style.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest at medium height, matching the width of the seat, with attached cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid burgundy color with a smooth, untextured leather or faux leather finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
